falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (a key level from bottom_2024_aug) by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout contradicting the pattern's bearish expectation, invalidating the HOLD

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate a market phase shift, refuting the current pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.5% (a key support level from August 2024)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown in bond markets would signal a different macro scenario than the one implied by the HOLD

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
